title: Section 184
content: Any person who is required by such requisition to execute any work or to do anything may instead of executing the work or doing the thing required, prefer an objection in writing to the municipality against such requisition within fifteen days of the service of the notice affixing or posting up of the notification containing the requisition, or if the time within which he is required to comply with the requisition be less than fifteen days, then within such less time.
